-mfx-allow-copy.description: Whether the password field allows copying its content to the clipboard.

-mfx-allow-cut.description: Whether the password field allows cutting its content to the clipboard.

-mfx-allow-paste.description: Whether the password field allows pasting from the clipboard.

-mfx-alignment.description: The alignment of the stepper's toggles along its progress bar.

-mfx-alt-color.description: The alternative accent color used by the stepper for inactive toggles and icons.

-mfx-alternative-unit-increment.description: The alternative increment step applied when adjusting the slider value with fine-grained input.

-mfx-animate-background.description: Whether the ripple generator animates the background along with the ripple effect.

-mfx-animate-lines.description: Whether the focus and unfocused lines are animated on focus change.

-mfx-animate-on-press.description: Whether the slider value is animated when the track is pressed.

-mfx-animated.description: Whether the floating prompt text transitions are animated.

-mfx-animation-duration.description: The duration in milliseconds of the tree item expand/collapse animation.

-mfx-animation-speed.description: A multiplier applied to the default animation speed of the control.

-mfx-auto-clip.description: Whether the ripple effect is automatically clipped to the host region bounds.

-mfx-background-insets.description: The insets applied around the cell's background fill.

-mfx-background-opacity.description: The opacity of the background overlay animated alongside the ripple.

-mfx-bar-animated.description: Whether the stepper's progress bar animates its progress changes.

-mfx-bar-background.description: The background color of the stepper's progress bar track.

-mfx-bar-borders-radius.description: The corner radius of the stepper's progress bar.

-mfx-base-color.description: The primary accent color used by the stepper for active elements.

-mfx-bidirectional.description: Whether the slider can be dragged in both directions from its current value.

-mfx-border-gap.description: The horizontal gap inside the border used by the floating text when FloatMode is BORDER.

-mfx-button-type.description: The visual style of the button, either flat or raised with a shadow.

-mfx-caret-visible.description: Whether the text field shows its text caret.

-mfx-color1.description: The first color used in the spinner's four-color indeterminate animation.

-mfx-color2.description: The second color used in the spinner's four-color indeterminate animation.

-mfx-color3.description: The third color used in the spinner's four-color indeterminate animation.

-mfx-color4.description: The fourth color used in the spinner's four-color indeterminate animation.

-mfx-content-disposition.description: The position of the text relative to the control's graphic.

-mfx-corner-radius.description: The corner radius of the cell's background.

-mfx-depth-level.description: The depth level of the drop shadow applied to the control.

-mfx-editable.description: Whether the text field's content can be edited by the user.

-mfx-extra-spacing.description: The extra spacing added at the two ends of the stepper's progress bar.

-mfx-float-mode.description: The floating behavior of the text field's prompt text.

-mfx-gap.description: The spacing between the control's graphic and its text.

-mfx-hide-character.description: The character used to mask the password field's content.

-mfx-hide-cursor.description: Whether the system cursor is hidden while the magnifier is active.

-mfx-hide-scrollbars.description: Whether the list view's scrollbars are hidden until hover.

-mfx-hide-zoom-label-after.description: The time in milliseconds before the magnifier's zoom label fades out.

-mfx-hover-color.description: The background color applied to the cell or row while hovered.

-mfx-label-text-gap.description: The spacing between the stepper toggle's circle and its label text.

-mfx-length.description: The length of the toggle button's track.

-mfx-lens-size.description: The diameter of the magnifier's circular lens.

-mfx-line-color.description: The color of the focused underline beneath the combo box.

-mfx-line-stroke-cap.description: The stroke cap style of the combo box's underline.

-mfx-line-stroke-width.description: The stroke width of the combo box's underline.

-mfx-max-zoom.description: The maximum zoom factor allowed by the magnifier.

-mfx-measure-unit-gap.description: The gap between the text field's content and its measure unit label.

-mfx-min-zoom.description: The minimum zoom factor allowed by the magnifier.

-mfx-minor-ticks-count.description: The number of minor ticks rendered between two major ticks.

-mfx-paused.description: Whether the ripple generator is paused and does not emit new ripples.

-mfx-picker-pos.description: The vertical position of the magnifier's color picker relative to the lens.

-mfx-picker-spacing.description: The spacing between the magnifier's lens and its color picker.

-mfx-popup-side.description: Which side of the slider the popup value indicator appears on.

-mfx-progress-color.description: The color of the stepper's progress bar fill.

-mfx-radio-gap.description: The gap between the radio button's outer circle and its inner filled dot.

-mfx-radius.description: The radius of the control's circular component.

-mfx-ripple-color.description: The color of the ripple effect.

-mfx-ripple-opacity.description: The initial opacity of the emitted ripple.

-mfx-ripple-radius.description: The maximum radius the ripple reaches before fading.

-mfx-rows-count.description: The number of rows displayed in the combo box's popup.

-mfx-scale-on-above.description: Whether the prompt text scales down when floating above the field.

-mfx-scroll-on-open.description: Whether the combo box scrolls to the selected item when the popup opens.

-mfx-selected-color.description: The background color applied to the cell or row when selected.

-mfx-show-major-ticks.description: Whether the slider renders major tick marks along its track.

-mfx-show-minor-ticks.description: Whether the slider renders minor tick marks between major ticks.

-mfx-show-password.description: Whether the password field reveals its content as plain text.

-mfx-show-ticks-at-edge.description: Whether tick marks are rendered at the edges of the slider track.

-mfx-show-zoom-label.description: Whether the magnifier displays its current zoom factor as a label.

-mfx-size.description: The overall size of the control.

-mfx-slider-mode.description: The snap behavior of the slider when the thumb is released.

-mfx-spacing.description: The horizontal spacing between the stepper's toggles.

-mfx-starting-angle.description: The angle in degrees at which the spinner's indeterminate animation starts.

-mfx-stroke-width.description: The stroke width of the stepper toggle's outer circle.

-mfx-text-expand.description: Whether the text label can grow beyond its computed width to fill available space.

-mfx-text-limit.description: The maximum number of characters allowed in the field, or -1 for unlimited.

-mfx-text-position.description: The position of the label text relative to the control's graphic.

-mfx-tick-unit.description: The value interval between two major ticks on the slider.

-mfx-unfocused-line-color.description: The color of the underline beneath the combo box when it is not focused.

-mfx-unit-increment.description: The increment step applied when adjusting the slider value via the keyboard or wheel.

-mfx-validate.description: Whether the combo box performs validation on its selected value.

-mfx-zoom.description: The current zoom factor applied by the magnifier.

-mfx-zoom-increment.description: The zoom factor increment applied on each zoom-in or zoom-out step.
